id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},

banner_1 = #{banner1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id , banner_1 , store_display_img_url_1 , store_display_img_url_2 , store_display_img_url_3 , store_display_img_url_4 , make_show_title_img_url , make_show_img_url_1 , make_show_img_url_2 , make_show_img_url_3 from mlsd_store_display where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
